name: chimpanzee_chrY_P3_amplicon
description: Pan troglodytes chrY Y palindrome P3. AmpliconY copy structure differs strongly between great apes; chimpanzee estimated copies: 2. Substrate for intrachromosomal NAHR and rapid Y-lineage turnover (Hughes/Page 2010, T2T-ape 2024).

architecture.internal_structure: Y ampliconic family P3; intra-Y NAHR via arm-to-arm gene-conversion; copy number under strong meiotic-drive-like turnover.

related_diseases: ape Y spermatogenic phenotypes (analogous to human AZFa/b/c)
